description: Standard Bid Evaluation Criteria for Public Works Tender Scrutiny

eligibility_criteria.name: Annual Turnover
eligibility_criteria.description: Bidder's average annual financial turnover during last 3 years should be at least X times estimated cost

eligibility_criteria.name: Similar Work Experience
eligibility_criteria.description: Should have completed at least one similar work of value >= 80% of estimated cost OR two works >= 50% in last 5 years
eligibility_criteria.document_required: Work Completion Certificates from competent authority

eligibility_criteria.name: Valid Registration
eligibility_criteria.description: Bidder must be registered with appropriate authority (PWD, CPWD, Railways, etc.) in relevant category

eligibility_criteria.name: EMD / Bid Security
eligibility_criteria.description: Earnest Money Deposit must be deposited in prescribed form (FDR/DD/BG) for required amount

eligibility_criteria.name: Bid Validity
eligibility_criteria.description: Bid must be valid for minimum 120 days from date of opening

eligibility_criteria.name: GST Registration
eligibility_criteria.description: Valid GST registration number must be provided

eligibility_criteria.name: PAN Card
eligibility_criteria.description: Valid PAN card of firm / proprietor / directors

eligibility_criteria.name: Bid Submission Authority
eligibility_criteria.description: Person submitting bid must have authority (power of attorney if not proprietor)

eligibility_criteria.name: Litigation History
eligibility_criteria.description: Bidder should not have any adverse litigation history or blacklisting

eligibility_criteria.name: Integrity Pact
eligibility_criteria.description: Signed integrity pact (if applicable for works above prescribed threshold)
